doze.configuration.title: Doze Settings
doze.configuration.advanced.tooltip: Don't mess with these unless you know what you're doing!
doze.configuration.sleepOutside.tooltip: Whether players are allowed to sleep outside
doze.configuration.minimumLight.tooltip: Minimum light level required for sleep. Set to 0 to disable
doze.configuration.healthPerHour.tooltip: Amount players will heal per hour slept. Set to 0 to disable
doze.configuration.hungerCost.tooltip: Cost of hunger per hour healed during sleep. Set to 0 to disable
doze.configuration.clearEffects.tooltip: Hours of sleep required to clear potion effects. Set to 0 to disable
doze.configuration.bedsExplode.tooltip: Whether beds explode in dimensions like the Nether
doze.configuration.tickHour.tooltip: If you use a mod that alters time, this setting should match the relative length (in ticks) of one hour
block.doze.bed.too_dark: You can't sleep here, it's too dark
block.doze.bed.dimension_nether: You can't sleep here, it's much too warm
block.doze.bed.dimension_end: You can't sleep here, they won't let you
block.doze.bed.dimension_mod: You can't sleep in this dimension
